theory.canonical_statement: The histogramspinorbits source node is normalized as a Trawin Hamiltonian spin-orbit histogram carrier.
theory.technical_interpretation: The equation support layer should use: \hat{H}_{\mathrm{Trawin}}; \mathrm{Hist}_{\mathrm{spin\mbox{-}orbit}}\!\left(\hat{H}_{\mathrm{Trawin}}\right). This preserves the usable mathematical content and leaves final source-truth promotion for review.

dictionary_sections.definition: Trawin Hamiltonian Spin-Orbit Histogram Node is a repaired production preview that replaces an artifact/copy heading with the strongest local source-backed mathematical carrier.
dictionary_sections.contextual_meaning: The entry is read through \hat{H}_{\mathrm{Trawin}}. Its supporting progression preserves the relevant local equation chain while keeping artifact names out of the production canonical field.
dictionary_sections.derivable_consequences: The repair gives the folder a printable canonical spine, a specific symbol key, and a derivation target without modifying source-truth JSON.
dictionary_sections.lemma_support: Artifact-title normalization; source-backed canonical carrier; TRAWIN admissibility review.
dictionary_sections.technical_interpretation: The equation support layer should use: \hat{H}_{\mathrm{Trawin}}; \mathrm{Hist}_{\mathrm{spin\mbox{-}orbit}}\!\left(\hat{H}_{\mathrm{Trawin}}\right). This preserves the usable mathematical content and leaves final source-truth promotion for review.
dictionary_sections.interpretive_role: This repaired node prevents file-transfer metadata from being treated as production content while still carrying the best available source-backed relation.
dictionary_sections.tzp_thesaurus:
\begin{enumerate}[leftmargin=1.6em,itemsep=6pt,topsep=4pt]
\item Repaired Registry Node: artifact title normalized into a production-safe mathematical carrier.
\item Source-Backed Canonical Spine: the selected relation used to align dictionary, symbol key, Wolfram form, and derivation layer.
\item Review-Gated Promotion: source-truth remains unchanged until the repaired preview is approved.
\end{enumerate}

\]
